description.en: Provides AI capabilities to Easysearch, enabling intelligent features such as vector embeddings and AI-powered search.
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供 AI 能力，支持向量嵌入和 AI 智能搜索等功能。

description.en: HanLP Analyzer for Easysearch, providing advanced Chinese text analysis with NLP capabilities.
description.zh_cn: 基于 HanLP 的 Easysearch 中文分词器，提供高级中文文本分析和 NLP 能力。

description.en: Integrates the Lucene ICU module into Easysearch, adding ICU-related analysis components for internationalization support.
description.zh_cn: 将 Lucene ICU 模块集成到 Easysearch 中，提供 ICU 相关的分析组件以支持国际化。

description.en: Integrates Lucene IK analyzer into Easysearch with support for customized dictionaries for Chinese text segmentation.
description.zh_cn: 将 Lucene IK 分词器集成到 Easysearch，支持自定义词典的中文分词。

description.en: Provides Russian and English morphology analysis for Easysearch, enabling stemming and lemmatization.
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供俄语和英语形态学分析，支持词干提取和词形还原。

description.en: Pinyin Analysis plugin for conversion between Chinese characters and Pinyin, useful for Chinese search by pronunciation.
description.zh_cn: 拼音分析插件，用于汉字和拼音之间的转换，支持按发音进行中文搜索。

description.en: STConvert analyzer that converts Chinese characters between Traditional and Simplified forms.
description.zh_cn: 简繁转换分析器，用于中文繁体字和简体字之间的相互转换。

description.en: Provides asynchronous search for Easysearch
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供异步搜索功能

description.en: Provides cross-cluster-replication for Easysearch
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供跨集群复制功能

description.en: Provides index lifecycle management for Easysearch
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供索引生命周期管理功能

description.en: Provides common ingest processors for data preprocessing during document ingestion.
description.zh_cn: 提供通用的数据摄入处理器，用于文档摄入过程中的数据预处理。

description.en: Ingest processor that looks up geographical data based on IP addresses using the MaxMind geo database.
description.zh_cn: 基于 IP 地址查找地理位置信息的摄入处理器，使用 MaxMind 地理数据库。

description.en: Ingest processor that extracts device and browser information from user agent strings.
description.zh_cn: 从用户代理字符串中提取设备和浏览器信息的摄入处理器。

description.en: Jieba Chinese text segmentation plugin for Easysearch, providing accurate Chinese word segmentation.
description.zh_cn: 基于结巴分词的 Easysearch 中文分词插件，提供精准的中文分词功能。

description.en: Plugin for exact and approximate nearest neighbor search on sparse and dense vectors, enabling similarity search.
description.zh_cn: 支持稀疏和稠密向量的精确及近似最近邻搜索插件，用于相似度检索。

description.en: Adds support for text fields with markup used to inject annotation tokens into the index.
description.zh_cn: 支持带有标记的文本字段，用于将注释令牌注入到索引中。

description.en: Allows computing Murmur3 hashes of field values at index-time and storing them in the index.
description.zh_cn: 在索引时计算字段值的 Murmur3 哈希值并存储在索引中。

description.en: Allows documents to record their uncompressed size at index time for storage monitoring.
description.zh_cn: 允许文档在索引时记录其未压缩大小，用于存储监控。

description.en: Matches streaming documents against pre-stored queries for real-time rule matching and alerting.
description.zh_cn: 将流式文档与预存储的查询进行匹配，用于实时规则匹配和告警。

description.en: Provides SQL query capability for Easysearch, allowing users to query data using familiar SQL syntax.
description.zh_cn: 为 Easysearch 提供 SQL 查询能力，允许用户使用熟悉的 SQL 语法查询数据。

description.en: Provides NIO-based network transport for improved network performance and scalability.
description.zh_cn: 提供基于 NIO 的网络传输层，提升网络性能和可扩展性。

description.en: Provides static resource loading capability and serves the web management console for Easysearch.
description.zh_cn: 提供静态资源加载能力，并作为 Easysearch 的 Web 管理控制台。
